title: FinzWild:Friends
description: Add Little Snake-like Creature from Another World!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94250114d4e95746b32dbe111b41ef9090146fb7.png)

# **Disclaimer**
I'm Japanese, so I'm sorry if my English is wrong.

# **About**
This mod Add Little Snake-like Creature from Another World!

Nillo is a character that will appear in our upcoming Adventure Map, "FinzKiil."

If you're interested, please stay tuned for more information!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YURJdLrJuMU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# **Mobs**
## Nillo
![Nillo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cffa624fff3f69efe94a703f86a48ef56550e45.png)

They are small snakes that can be tamed.

They can be tamed with raw chicken and their basic behavior is similar to that of a tamed wolf.

There are several types of them:

Normal - Spawns in many biomes such as forests and deserts.

Hunter - Spawns in forests and jungles. Has high Attack.

Pond - Spawns in rivers and oceans. Lives in water.

Glider - Spawns in mountains and grasslands. Can fly.

Rocky - Spawns in deserts, wilderness, etc. Has high Armor.



## **Gillo**
![Gillo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/560a49b3e5d3455ed65b3fb3d58cc61711cab86d.png)

A large variant of Nillo.
It cannot equip Nillo Armor, but has higher stats and can be ridden.



# **Items**
## **Nillo Armor (1.20.6 or later)**
![Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/105910ff7e51f0f1369212a9f318579a4f556b7a.png)
Nillo Armor has leather armor that increases defense, and armadillo armor that works similarly to the wolf.
Can be equipped by any Nillo except Gillo.



## **Amulets**
![Amulets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ce3e96b4c9fb3035664dfe5a50277f22485df31.png)
Amulets are items that give Nillo additional abilities.
Amulets have four attributes:

Fire - Found in Trail Ruins and Desert Pyramids. Gains Fire Resistance and adds fire to attacks

Aqua - Found in Trail Ruins and Ocean Ruins. Gains Water Breathing and adds Slowness to attacks

Wind - Found in Trail Ruins and Pillager Outposts. Gains Fall Resistance and increases knockback on attacks

Earth - Found in Trail Ruins and Mineshafts. Gains Knockback Resistance and extra armor.

All amulets can be crafted into a String.
